name: a public e-commerce storefront drives CDN multi-region and frontend hosting
command:
printf %s '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"revenue","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"balanced","data_cadence":"real-time","workload":"online store for handmade goods","criticality":"mission-critical","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"hyperscale","consistency_need":"eventual","communication_style":"synchronous","integration_scope":"public"}}' > p.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh --vision "online store for handmade goods" --profile p.json --out-dir s --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(File.read("s/technical-requirements.json")); f=d["pillars"].values.flatten.map{|c| c["concern"]}; ng=(d["needs_grounding"]||[]).size; pk=d["pillars"].keys; abort unless %w[cdn multi_region spa_hosting].all?{|x| f.include?(x)}' && echo ecommerce-global-delivery 1>&2
